==Key Clue Records==
Complete these Key Clues in [[Bharata]] for various rewards and to fully progress through the Realm.
Please note that requirements ending with a ? are an approximation.

==Peacock Empire==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +2h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
|-
|Calcutta Conquest
|Dominate [[Bharata Apostles#Tagore|Tagore]]
|-
|Munbay Conquest
|Dominate [[Bharata Apostles#Bahubali|Bahubali]]
|-
|Deli Conquest
|Dominate [[Bharata Apostles#Ultimate Motorcycle|Ultimate Motorcycle]]
|-
|Bunjab Conquest
|Dominate [[Bharata Apostles#Ashoka|Ashoka]]
|}

==Manusmriti==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +3}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
|-
|Master all Bharata INTEL
|Obtain all 52 Koryeo INTEL tiles
|-
|Master all All-in-One INTEL
|Obtain all 63 Agent Training tiles
|}

==Blessing of Vaisravana==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
|-
|Redeem all [[Bharata Cards#Tier 1 (White)|limited cards (white)]]
|Exchange all 10 white card items
|-
|Redeem all [[Bharata Cards#Tier 2 (Green)|limited cards (green)]]
|Exchange all 10 green card items
|-
|Redeem all [[Bharata Cards#Tier 3 (Blue)|limited cards (blue)]]
|Exchange all 9 blue card items
|-
|Redeem all [[Bharata Cards#Tier 4 (Purple)|limited cards (purple)]]
|Exchange all 9 purple card items
|-
|Redeem all [[Bharata Cards#Tier 5 (Orange)|limited cards (orange)]]
|Exchange all 8 orange card items
|}

==Journey to the West==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +3}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
|-
|All Traveler Monks reach max level
|[[Journey to the West#Sanzang|Traveler Monks Total level]] 200/200
|-
|Pass the Eighty-one Adversities
|[[Journey to the West#Adversities|Stages Passed]] 81/81
|-
|Max all Traveler Monk skills
|[[Journey to the West#Sanzang|Skills Maxed]] 36/36
|-
|Max all Traveler Monk gears
|[[Journey to the West#Gear|Traveller Monk Gear Maxed]] 24/24
|}

==Ashoka's Repentance==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +2}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Bharata Treasure Map, +50}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Clue!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Cliff Inscription (Mahya Pradesh)||Cliff Guardian||FAME 17420?||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Pillar Inscription (Utar Pradesh)||Damaged Pillar||TECH 17740?||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Pagoda Inscription (Ranki)||Rundown Pagoda||TECH 19820?||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Buddah's Path==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Divine Order Chest, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Purple Reagent, +50}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Clue!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Sadhu's Sutra (Munbay)||Sadhu's Body||ART 18540?||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +1500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Five Monks' Sutra (Goea)||Five Monks Statue||FTH 19020?||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Demon Cell, +2000}}
|-
|Heretic's Sutra (Bunjab)||Heretic||FAME 19420??||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +1500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|}

==Legend of the Trimurdi==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Gear Chest, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +2h}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Clue!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Shiva's Miracle (Ranki)||Bizarre Bronze Coffin||CIV 19980?||{{RewardIcon|Wonder Fungus Blue HP}} {{Retext|Blue HP-Fungus|blue}} +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Brahma's Miracle (Gujalatt)||Ancient Carvings||FTH 18220?||{{RewardIcon|Wonder Fungus Blue RUSH}} {{Retext|Blue RUSH-Fungus|blue}} +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Vishnu's Miracle (Deli)||Shining Lotus||TECH 15900??||{{RewardIcon|Wonder Fungus Blue DEF}} {{Retext|Blue DEF-Fungus|blue}} +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|}

==Mukhal's Afterglow==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup, +4h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Clue!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Noble's Document (Deli)||Valorous Guard||FAME 19660?||{{RewardIconWithText|Bharata Treasure Map, +5}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Labor's Document (Andra Pradesh)||Weathered Body||ART 20140?||{{RewardIconWithText|Mutant Cell, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Merchant's Document (Mahya Pradesh)||Exquisite Vase||CIV 17580?||{{RewardIconWithText|Bharata Treasure Map, +5}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Royal Document (Gujalatt)||Gilded Statue||FTH 18380?||{{RewardIconWithText|Bharata Treasure Map, +5}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|}

==Monk's Trace==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +2h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Clue!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Nalanda Temple Minutes (Utar Pradesh)||Sutra Guard||FAME 17900?||{{RewardIconWithText|Intel, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Tiladaka Temple Minutes (Bunjab)||Dusty Buddha Statue||FTH 19260??||{{RewardIconWithText|Intel, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Kanyakubja Minutes (Munbay)||Royal Jewelry Chest||CIV 18860?||{{RewardIconWithText|Intel, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|}

==Animism==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Organ Chest, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +4h}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Clue!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Rabbit's Spirit (Calcutta)||Scattered Bones||ART 19340?||{{RewardIconWithText|Organ Slime, +20}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Willow's Spirit (Goea)||Heavy Dead Wood||CIV 19180?||{{RewardIconWithText|Organ Slime, +20}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Spider's Spirit (Andra Pradesh)||Strong Cobweb||TECH 20540?||{{RewardIconWithText|Organ Slime, +20}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Elephant's Remains (Mahya Pradesh)||Elephant's Remains||ART 17340?||{{RewardIconWithText|Organ Slime, +20}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Buddah's Teachings==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Incense, +1}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Clue!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Copy of Nirvana Sutra (Calcutta)||Ancient Copy||TECH 19500?||{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +30m}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Copy of Peacock Sutra (Bunjab)||Guard of Sutra Library||19180??||{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +30m}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Copy of Amitabha Sutra (Andra Pradesh)||Solemn Stone Buddha||FTH 20300?||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Copy of Epiphany Sutra (Deli)||Believer's Offering||CIV 17660?||{{RewardIconWithText|Angel Cell, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|}

==Ganges Worship==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIcon|Wonder Fungus Orange HP}} {{Retext|Orange HP-Fungus|orange}} +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Magic Potion, +30}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Clue!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Tired Pilgrim (Ranki)||Remains at the Riverside||ART 19740?||{{RewardIconWithText|Zombie Cell, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Pious Pilgrim (Goea)||Ganga Statue||FTH 19260?||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Rich Pilgrim (Deli)||Offering Carriage||??||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +1500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Wise Pilgrim (Gujalatt)||Sanskrit Scripture||TECH 18300?||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|}

==Ancient Advanced Civilization==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Tool Chest, +100}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Clue!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Anc. Flyer Blueprint (Utar Pradesh)||Ancient Grave Goods||ART 18140?||{{RewardIconWithText|Mutant Cell, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Anc. Solar Blueprint (Ranki)||Ancient Vault||CIV 19900?||{{RewardIconWithText|Bharata Treasure Map, +5}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Anc. N-Bomb Blueprint (Goea)||Ancient Mecha Soldier||FAME 19100?||{{RewardIconWithText|Mecha Cell, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|}

==Artifact & Magic==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Wish Coin, +1}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Yama's Bone (Utar Pradesh)||Display Orange Relic: related to Sarira; Display {{RewardIconWithLink|Buddha Finger Sarira|orange}}||{{RewardIconWithText|Demon Cell, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Ganesha's Brush (Deli)||Display Relic: Art>100; 5*{{RewardIconWithLink|Parthenon Marbles|orange}} works||{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +1000}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Indra's Pestle (Munbay)||Display Orange Relic: Related to diamonds; Display {{RewardIconWithLink|Africa Star|orange}}||{{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +2000}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Surya's Chariot (Calcutta)||Display Orange Relic: Related to Transportation; Display {{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Chariot|orange}}||???
|-
|}

==Recruitment==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Bharata Treasure Map, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Ad Chest, +60}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Suyodhana Draft Notice (Calcutta)||Watch an Ad||{{RewardIconWithText|Ad Chest, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +30m}}
|-
|Yudhisthira Draft Notice (Gujalatt)||Watch an Ad||{{RewardIconWithText|Ad Chest, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +30m}}
|-
|Rama Draft (Bunjab)||Watch an Ad||{{RewardIconWithText|Ad Chest, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +30m}}
|-
|Ravana Draft Notice (Andra Pradesh)||Watch an Ad||{{RewardIconWithText|Ad Chest, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +30m}}
|}

==Rama Greataxe==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +4h}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
|-
|Craft {{Gearlink|green|realm|Legion Javelins}}
|-
|Craft {{Gearlink|blue|realm|Kukri}}
|-
|Craft {{Gearlink|purple|realm|Mughal Scimitar}}
|-
|Craft {{Gearlink|orange|realm|Ashoka's Sword}}
|-
|Craft {{Gearlink|red|realm|Rama Greataxe}}
|}

==Bharata Treasure==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Golden Pickaxe, +3}},{{RewardIconWithText|Bharata Treasure Map, +50}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!<nowiki>#</nowiki> of items found!!Rewards
|-
|Parvati's Gift (Calcutta)||2||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup, +2h}}
|-
|Agni's Treasure (Calcutta)||4||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Purple Reagent, +20}}
|-
|Rama Treasure (Mahya Pradesh)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Novice Scroll, +10}}
|-
|Sita's Legacy (Mahya Pradesh)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Toner, +10}}
|-
|Hanuman's Gift (Utar Pradesh)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Mecha Cell, +2000}}
|-
|Mt. Spirit Treasure (Utar Pradesh)||4||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +2h}}
|-
|Pandavas Treasure (Gujalatt)||4||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +1}}
|-
|Brahma Box (Gujalatt)||2||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup, +2h}}
|-
|Mughal Royal Treasure (Munbay)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Angel Cell, +2000}}
|-
|Ivory Handicraft (Munbay)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Mutant Cell, +2000}}
|-
|Soma Wine Jar (Goea)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Demon Cell, +2000}}
|-
|Surya's Gift (Goea)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5000}}
|-
|Kurukshetra War Supplies (Deli)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +2000}}
|-
|Vishnu's Gift (Deli)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +1h}}
|-
|Jalandhara Case (Ranki)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Zombie Cell, +2000}}
|-
|Shiva Treasure (Ranki)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +2h}}
|-
|Ravana's Legacy (Andra Pradesh)||2||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +2000}}
|-
|Handmade Saree (Andra Pradesh)||4||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Expert Scroll, +10}}
|-
|Indra Offering (Bunjab)||2||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Organ Slime, +30}}
|-
|Sikh Adult Rite (Bunjab)||4||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Purple Reagent, +20}}
|-
|}
